scripts.deploy:dry-run: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; pnpm build && mkdir -p .wrangler/tmp .wrangler/logs && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name storail --dry-run'
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; WEBSITE_CANONICAL_URL=${WEBSITE_CANONICAL_URL:-https://storail.pages.dev/} pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name storail'
